title: Fix app bugs reported after Version 5 deployment

requirements.text: Audit and fix bugs in the public chat message feed: ensure messages load correctly, sending a new message works without errors, and the message feed auto-scrolls to the latest message after posting.

quotes: The app is not working correctly. It has bugs in it that I need you to fix.

acceptanceCriteria: Public chat messages load and display in chronological order on page load.
Sending a new message via the MessageInput form posts successfully and appears in the feed.
The feed auto-scrolls to the newest message after a message is sent or received.
No console errors are thrown during normal chat usage.

requirements.text: Audit and fix bugs in the Friends panel: user search by username returns correct results, sending a friend request succeeds, incoming friend requests can be accepted or declined, and the friend list displays with accurate online/offline status indicators.

quotes: The app is not working correctly. It has bugs in it that I need you to fix.

acceptanceCriteria: Searching for a username returns matching users or an empty state message.
Sending a friend request completes without error and reflects in the recipient's incoming requests.
Accepting a friend request moves the user to the friend list.
Declining a friend request removes it from the incoming list.
Online/offline status indicators reflect each friend's lastOnline timestamp correctly.

requirements.text: Audit and fix bugs in the private chat view: opening a private chat with a friend loads the correct message thread, sending messages in a private thread works, and the view auto-scrolls to the latest message.

quotes: The app is not working correctly. It has bugs in it that I need you to fix.

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a friend in the Friends panel opens the correct private chat thread.
Private chat messages load and display in chronological order.
Sending a message in a private thread posts successfully and appears in the thread.
The private chat view auto-scrolls to the newest message after sending or receiving.

requirements.text: Audit and fix bugs in the video call modal: the video call button in both the Friends panel and the Private Chat view opens the VideoCallModal correctly, the local camera stream initialises without errors, mute/camera toggle controls function as expected, and ending the call properly cleans up the stream and closes the modal.

quotes: The app is not working correctly. It has bugs in it that I need you to fix.

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the video call button opens the VideoCallModal in a 'Calling…' state.
The local camera feed appears in the picture-in-picture area of the modal.
The mute button toggles the microphone track on/off without errors.
The camera toggle button turns the video track on/off without errors.
Clicking 'End Call' stops all media tracks, clears the stream, and closes the modal.
Pressing Escape also ends the call and closes the modal.
No unhandled promise rejections or console errors occur during the call lifecycle.

requirements.text: Audit and fix bugs in the user profile setup flow: the DisplayNamePrompt and ProfileSetupModal correctly create or retrieve a user profile on first launch, and returning users are not re-prompted unnecessarily.

quotes: The app is not working correctly. It has bugs in it that I need you to fix.

acceptanceCriteria: A new user is prompted to enter a display name and username exactly once.
After profile creation, the user enters the main chat view without being re-prompted.
A returning user is not shown the profile setup modal on subsequent visits.
Profile data (username, display name) is persisted and retrieved correctly from the backend.

requirements.text: Fix any backend Motoko actor issues: ensure all public functions (postMessage, getMessages, createUserProfile, getUserProfile, sendFriendRequest, acceptFriendRequest, declineFriendRequest, getPrivateThread, sendPrivateMessage, updateOnlineStatus) return correct results and do not trap or throw unexpected errors under normal usage.

quotes: The app is not working correctly. It has bugs in it that I need you to fix.

acceptanceCriteria: All backend query and update functions return expected result types without trapping.
Concurrent calls to postMessage do not produce duplicate or out-of-order messages.
Friend request state transitions (pending → accepted/declined) are handled atomically.
Private message threads are scoped correctly to the two participants and not visible to others.
Online status updates persist and are retrievable via getUserProfile.

constraints: Do not change the existing data model or break backwards compatibility with stored state.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
All fixes must preserve the existing warm coral/amber visual theme.
nonGoals: Adding new features beyond what is already implemented.
Redesigning the UI or changing the visual theme.
Adding real peer-to-peer WebRTC functionality (video call remains simulated).
